name: bento-pp-mcp
description: Every Bento feature, plus the ones their own CLI does not have, plus a local SQLite store that turns 'who are my top spenders by tag' into a one-liner.

bento_publishable_key.title: BENTO_PUBLISHABLE_KEY
bento_publishable_key.description: Basic auth username. Starts with pk_. Available in your Bento dashboard under Settings -> API Keys.

bento_secret_key.title: BENTO_SECRET_KEY
bento_secret_key.description: Basic auth password. Starts with sk_. Available in your Bento dashboard under Settings -> API Keys. Never expose client-side.

bento_site_uuid.title: BENTO_SITE_UUID
bento_site_uuid.description: Bento site identifier. Attached to every request as ?site_uuid= on GETs and in the JSON body on POSTs. Available in your Bento dashboard under Account -> Site Settings.
